nodes.name: api-audit-log.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module providing field labels, placeholders, and CRUD status messages for the API audit log page.

nodes.name: api.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the API management page, covering path, method, module, sync action confirmations, and operation feedback strings.

nodes.name: dashboard.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the dashboard, providing grouped labels for stats, charts, traffic sources, categories, devices, and time-series data.

nodes.name: data-access-audit-log.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the data access audit log page, including access type enumerations (READ/CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE) and query placeholders.

nodes.name: dict-entry.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the dictionary entry management page, with field labels, validation messages, and i18n-aware title editing dialog strings.

nodes.name: dict-type.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the dictionary type management page, covering type name/code fields, status mapping, and CRUD operation feedback.

nodes.name: file.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the file management page, including upload/edit/delete actions, file name validation, and storage provider mapping labels.

nodes.name: inbox.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the inbox page, providing read/unread status labels, mark-read action feedback, and empty state hints.

nodes.name: internal-message.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the internal message management page, covering title/content/category fields, status maps, and type enumerations.

nodes.name: language.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the language management page, including native name, language code, enabled/default flags, and yes/no toggles.

nodes.name: login-audit-log.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the login audit log page, including action type enum (LOGIN/LOGOUT/SESSION_EXPIRED/KICKED_OUT/PASSWORD_RESET) and risk level labels.

nodes.name: login-policy.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the login policy management page, covering target/type/method/value fields, reason input, and policy type/method mapping.

nodes.name: menu.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the menu management page, including menu name/title, parent/order, icon/path/component, authority, and advanced tab settings (keepAlive/affix/hideInMenu, etc.).

nodes.name: message-category.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the message category management page, covering category name/code, sort order, status, and CRUD feedback messages.

nodes.name: operation-audit-log.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the operation audit log page, providing field labels, query placeholders, and load-failure hint for user operation tracing.

nodes.name: org-unit.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the organization unit management page, covering unit name/code, parent unit, leader, sort order, status, and operation feedback.

nodes.name: permission-audit-log.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the permission audit log page, providing concise field labels, query placeholders, and a fetch-failure hint for permission change tracing.

nodes.name: permission-group.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the permission group management page, covering group name/code, parent group, sort order, status, and CRUD feedback messages.

nodes.name: permission.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the permission management page, including permission name/code/type, parent permission, sort order, status, and validation messages.

nodes.name: position.json
nodes.summary: en-US locale module for the position management page, covering position name/code, level, sort order, status, job description, and CRUD feedback.
